ArgonTest.Name: Base class field
ArgonTest.InputSource:
import Ar._
open class A <: Any
field name: String
public new(name: String) field name = name end
public proc self.say_hello(): () do puts 'Hello' puts name end
end
class B <: A
public new(name: String) initialize _ = A.new(name) end
end
proc main(): () do val obj: A = B.new('Tree') obj.say_hello() end
